headline: Synopsys Deepens Embedded Security And AI Links As Valuation Stays Steady
summary: Synopsys (NasdaqGS:SNPS) has expanded its collaboration with OmniTrust to improve security validation for embedded systems, focusing on earlier testing in the software development cycle. The partnership targets automotive and industrial applications, aiming to help manufacturers reduce vulnerabilities and shorten time to market for complex embedded products. Separately, Synopsys is involved in industry wide efforts around UALink Specification standards for accelerator connectivity that are...
